brains.name: Personal Planning Capability
brains.description: Internal capability for personal life planning, routines, health, errands, and relationship logistics. Intended to be orchestrated by Nexus rather than used as a separate persona.

brains.name: Schoolwork Capability
brains.description: Internal capability for coursework, deadlines, study plans, grading, and assignment planning. Intended to be orchestrated by Nexus.

brains.name: Trainer Capability
brains.description: Internal capability for workout planning, motivation, progressive overload tracking, and recovery guidance. Intended to support Nexus rather than act as a separate persona.

nexus.name: Nexus
nexus.description: Primary user-facing orchestrator. Holds global context, routes work to internal capabilities, and returns one coherent response.
